content: **Task delegation workflow (April 2026):** 1) JB gives task → 2) Jerry proposes plan and waits for approval → 3) JB approves → 4) Jerry goes to crew channel, assigns task, tells crew to @mention Jerry in THEIR channel when done → 5) Crew @mentions Jerry in their channel (no chatter from Jerry) → 6) Jerry returns to #jerry, @mentions JB, delivers completion report. Jerry does NOT reply in crew channels — no acknowledgments, no "good job." Jerry is the relay layer between JB and crew.
